basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Field Assistant (Field Worker) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address. The email application must be submitted on or before 11-07-2026. Candidates are advised to send their applications well before the deadline. In this article, you will find complete details about Field Assistant (Field Worker) Recruitment 202

qualification.details: A graduation (bachelor's degree) in any subject with working knowledge of Hindi and English. Candidates should have basic fieldwork experience and a willingness to work in rural/Himalayan agricultural areas. Preference will be given to candidates having experience in agriculture, environmental monitoring, wastewater treatment, field surveys, or community-based project work.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Mandi Field Assistant (Field Worker) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 11-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Mandi Field Assistant (Field Worker) Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT Mandi Field Assistant (Field Worker) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Mandi Field Assistant (Field Worker) Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT Mandi Field Assistant (Field Worker) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: A graduation (bachelor's degree) in any subject with working knowledge of Hindi and English. Candidates should have basic fieldwork experience and a willingness to work in rural/Himalayan agricultural areas. Preference will be given to candidates having experience in agriculture, environmental monitoring, wastewater treatment, field surveys, or community-based project work.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Mandi Field Assistant (Field Worker) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 11-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Field Assistant (Field Worker) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi Field Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Mandi Field Assistant (Field Worker) recruitment is 11th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Field Assistant (Field Worker) position, candidates must hold a Bachelor's degree in any subject. Working knowledge of Hindi and English is also necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Field Assistant (Field Worker) position is 30 years. There is no minimum age specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Field Assistant role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Field Assistant (Field Worker) post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 15,000.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Mandi Field Assistant position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data and attach required documents, then send it to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Field Assistant (Field Worker) position will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. What kind of experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Preference will be given to candidates with basic fieldwork experience and those willing to work in rural/Himalayan agricultural areas. Experience in agriculture, environmental monitoring, or community projects is also advantageous.

faq.question: Q9. What documents do I need to attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of your educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with your application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct link to the PDF is provided.
